tabs.general: Global settings including unit preferences, profiles, and configuration options.
tabs.appearance: Customize the visual style of all HUD elements including fonts and colors.
tabs.hotkeys: Configure keyboard shortcuts and controller buttons for quick access to HUD toggles.
tabs.riders: Track specific riders with custom colors and icons. Highlighted on standings, map, and radar.
tabs.rumble: Configure controller vibration for racing events like bumps, wheelspin, and impacts.
tabs.updates: Automatic update checking and installation. Downloads and installs new versions from GitHub.
tabs.standings: Live race standings showing position, gaps, and rider information for all competitors.
tabs.map: Overhead view of the track with real-time rider positions. Supports zoom and display modes.
tabs.radar: Shows nearby riders relative to your position. Useful for close racing awareness.
tabs.lap_log: History of your recent lap times with sector breakdowns. Shows lap-by-lap performance.
tabs.lap_consistency: Visualizes lap time consistency with bar charts and statistics. Track your improvement over time.
tabs.ideal_lap: Displays your theoretical best lap time calculated from your fastest individual sectors.
tabs.telemetry: Real-time input data including throttle, brake, clutch, RPM, suspension travel, and gear.
tabs.performance: System performance metrics including frame rate and plugin execution time.
tabs.records: Lap records from online providers (CBR, MXB-Ranked) for your current track.
tabs.pitboard: Info board at pit area or timing points. Shows position, lap times, and gap comparisons.
tabs.session: Session information including track, server details, player count, and password display.
tabs.timing: Lap and sector timing display with comparisons to session best and personal records.
tabs.gap_bar: Visual progress bar showing your gap to the rider ahead and behind.
tabs.widgets: Simple HUD elements showing speed, position, lap count, session time, and other info.
tabs.notices: On-screen notices for race events, personal bests, and setup warnings.
tabs.event_log: Scrolling feed of notable race events including session changes, fastest laps, penalties, and finishes.
tabs.fmx: Freestyle trick detection with scoring, chain combos, and rotation visualization.
tabs.stats: Per-track statistics including lap counts, crashes, gear shifts, top speed, and riding time.

controls.common.visible: Show or hide this element during gameplay.
controls.common.title: Toggle the title bar at the top of this HUD.
controls.common.texture: Select a background texture variant. Off uses a solid color background.
controls.common.opacity: Background transparency. 0% is fully transparent, 100% is fully opaque.
controls.common.scale: Size multiplier. Affects all text and graphics in this HUD.
controls.standings.live_gaps: Show real-time estimated gaps during races. When off, gaps only update at split points.
controls.standings.animate_positions: Smoothly animate riders sliding between positions when standings change.
controls.standings.filter_dns: Hide riders who did not start (DNS) from standings, position counts, and other displays.
controls.standings.rows: Maximum rider rows to show. More rows use more screen space.
controls.standings.col_tracked: Show status icons: hazard warnings, blue flags, checkered flags, and tracked rider markers.
controls.standings.col_name: Rider name display. Off hides the column, Short shows 3-letter abbreviation, Long shows full name.
controls.standings.col_status: Show session status indicator (PIT, DNS, DSQ, lap count, FIN).
controls.standings.col_penalty: Show penalty indicator when riders have active penalties.
controls.standings.gap_mode: Off hides the column. Player shows your gap, Adjacent shows gaps to riders ahead/behind, All for everyone.
controls.standings.gap_reference: Gap reference point. Leader shows gaps relative to P1, Player shows gaps relative to you.
controls.ideal_lap.sectors: Show your fastest individual sector times (S1, S2, S3).
controls.ideal_lap.laps: Show your last lap, best lap, and calculated ideal lap times.
controls.lap_log.rows: Number of recent laps to show.
controls.lap_log.order: Display order. Oldest shows oldest laps at top, Newest shows newest at top.
controls.lap_log.gap_row: Show live gap to personal best below the current lap time.
controls.lap_log.col_sectors: Show sector split times (S1, S2, S3).
controls.lap_consistency.style: Display mode. Graphs shows bar chart, Numbers shows statistics only, Both shows both.
controls.lap_consistency.reference: Baseline for comparison. Bars show delta to this reference time.
controls.lap_consistency.lap_count: Number of recent laps to include in the chart and statistics.
controls.lap_consistency.trend_mode: Trend line overlay. Off=none, Line=connected dots, Average=3-lap moving avg, Linear=regression.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_ref: Show reference time row. Displays the baseline time for comparison.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_best: Show best lap time from the displayed laps.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_avg: Show average lap time across the displayed laps.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_worst: Show worst (slowest) lap time from the displayed laps.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_last: Show your most recent lap time.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_stddev: Show standard deviation (+/-) indicating lap time spread.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_trend: Show trend indicator (Faster/Stable/Slower) based on recent laps.
controls.lap_consistency.stat_cons: Show consistency score (%). Higher is more consistent.
controls.telemetry.display: Display mode. Graphs shows visual meters, Numbers shows text values, Both shows both.
controls.performance.display: Display mode. Graphs shows visual meters, Numbers shows text values, Both shows both.
controls.performance.cpu: Show plugin execution time in milliseconds.
controls.performance.benchmark: Show profiler overlay with per-callback and per-HUD timing. Exports timestamped report when toggled off.
controls.pitboard.show_mode: When to show. Always shows constantly, At Pit shows near pit area, At Splits shows after timing points.
controls.pitboard.gap: Show gap comparison row. Displays time difference based on gap compare mode.
controls.pitboard.gap_compare: Auto uses leader in races, session PB when solo. Overall compares to any rider's best, Record to Records HUD.
controls.session.icons: Show icons next to each row. Off displays text only.
controls.session.type: Show session type (Practice, Qualifying, Race, etc.).
controls.session.format: Show session format (time/laps) and current state.
controls.session.server: Show server name when online, or 'Testing' when offline.
controls.session.players: Show current player count and server capacity.
controls.session.password_mode: Off hides row, Hidden shows ****. As Host/Client reveals password. Caution: As Client exposes the admin password.
controls.records.provider: Data source for leaderboard records. CBR or MXB Ranked.
controls.records.count: Number of records to show from the leaderboard.
controls.records.autofetch: Automatically fetch records when entering an event.
controls.records.col_sectors: Show sector time columns (S1, S2, S3). Only available with MXB Ranked provider.
controls.records.col_date: Show date when the record was set.
controls.timing.label: Show the label column (Split 1, Split 2, Lap).
controls.timing.time: Show the time column with split/lap times.
controls.timing.gap: Gap comparison for primary row. Off hides the gap column, or select a comparison type.
controls.timing.show: At Splits shows timing only after crossing a split point. Always shows timing constantly.
controls.timing.freeze: How long to display gap values after crossing a split. Off shows no gaps.
controls.timing.show_reference: Show reference times next to gaps.
controls.timing.layout: Vertical stacks elements in one column. Horizontal puts primary side-by-side, chips below.
controls.timing.secondary_pb: Show session personal best as secondary chip. Disabled when set as primary.
controls.timing.secondary_alltime: Show all-time personal best as secondary chip. Disabled when set as primary.
controls.timing.secondary_ideal: Show ideal lap (sum of best sectors) as secondary chip. Disabled when set as primary.
controls.timing.secondary_overall: Show overall best (any rider) as secondary chip. Disabled when set as primary.
controls.timing.secondary_record: Show fastest record from Records HUD as secondary chip. Disabled when set as primary.
controls.map.range: Zoom level. Full shows entire track, or select a specific range in meters.
controls.map.rotation: When On, the map rotates so your heading is always up. When Off, the map stays fixed to track.
controls.map.outline: Show the track outline. Useful for orientation but can be disabled for a cleaner look.
controls.map.track_width: Thickness of the track outline line.
controls.map.colorize: Rider marker colors. Uniform uses same color, Brand uses bike colors, Position by relative pos.
controls.map.rider_shape: Icon shape for rider markers on the map. Off hides non-tracked riders.
controls.map.marker_scale: Size of rider markers relative to the map.
controls.map.labels: Labels next to riders. Position shows P1/P2, Race Num shows numbers, Both shows both.
controls.radar.mode: When to show. Off hides radar, On shows always, Auto-hide shows only when riders are nearby.
controls.radar.range: Detection radius in meters. Riders outside this range are not shown.
controls.radar.colorize: Rider marker colors. Uniform uses same color, Brand uses bike colors, Position by relative pos.
controls.radar.rider_shape: Icon shape for rider markers on the radar.
controls.radar.marker_scale: Size of rider markers on the radar.
controls.radar.labels: Labels next to riders. Position shows P1/P2, Race Num shows numbers, Both shows both.
controls.radar.proximity_arrows: Directional arrows for nearby riders. Edge shows on screen edge, Circle shows around center.
controls.radar.alert_distance: Distance at which proximity arrows appear.
controls.radar.proximity_color: Color mode for proximity arrows. Distance fades with proximity, Position uses relative colors.
controls.radar.proximity_shape: Icon shape for proximity warning arrows.
controls.gap_bar.freeze: How long to freeze the gap bar display after a change.
controls.gap_bar.show_gap: Show gap time text in the center of the bar.
controls.gap_bar.show_gap_bar: Show the green/red gap visualization bars.
controls.gap_bar.range: Time range displayed on the gap bar in seconds.
controls.gap_bar.width: Width multiplier for the gap bar.
controls.gap_bar.marker_mode: Ghost shows your best lap marker. Opponents shows other riders. Both shows all.
controls.gap_bar.marker_colors: Rider marker colors. Uniform uses same color, Brand uses bike colors, Position by relative pos.
controls.gap_bar.icon: Icon shape used for rider markers on the bar.
controls.gap_bar.labels: Labels shown next to markers. Position, race number, or both.
controls.general.controller: Select which controller to use for gamepad widget and rumble effects.
controls.general.compact_times: Shorter time format. Drops leading 0: for times under a minute and uses tenths for gaps.
controls.general.speed_unit: Unit for speed display. mph or km/h.
controls.general.fuel_unit: Unit for fuel display. Liters or Gallons.
controls.general.temp_unit: Unit for temperature display. Celsius or Fahrenheit.
controls.general.clock_format: Clock time format. 24h uses 00:00-23:59, 12h uses 1:00-12:59 AM/PM.
controls.general.grid_snap: When enabled, HUDs snap to a grid when dragging.
controls.general.screen_clamp: When enabled, HUDs are clamped to stay within screen bounds when dragging.
controls.general.auto_save: When enabled, settings save automatically. Disable to edit the INI manually and reload.
controls.general.discord: Display your track, session, and lap progress in Discord's Rich Presence.
controls.general.auto_switch: Automatically switch profiles based on session type.
controls.general.copy_profile: Copy current profile settings to another profile.
controls.general.reset_profile: Reset current profile to default settings.
controls.general.reset_all: Reset all profiles and settings to defaults.
controls.updates.check_enabled: Check for updates when the game starts.
controls.updates.debug_mode: Test update installation without overwriting the real plugin.
controls.updates.channel: Stable only shows final releases. Prerelease includes test builds.
controls.appearance.font_digits: Font used for numeric values (times, gaps, telemetry).
controls.appearance.font_marker: Font used for pitboard handwritten text.
controls.appearance.font_small: Font used for small text and footnotes.
controls.appearance.color_primary: Main text color for values, times, and key data.
controls.appearance.color_secondary: Supporting text for live data, telemetry values, and descriptions.
controls.appearance.color_tertiary: Subtle labels, axis markers, and category names.
controls.appearance.color_muted: Placeholders, grid lines, and unavailable data.
controls.appearance.color_accent: Interactive elements, buttons, and hover highlights.
controls.appearance.color_warning: Caution indicators, low fuel, and proximity alerts.
controls.appearance.color_negative: Slower times, losses, and critical alerts.
controls.general.drop_shadow: Add a shadow behind all text for improved readability.
controls.rumble.enabled: Enable or disable controller vibration for all events.
controls.rumble.stack: When enabled, multiple rumble effects combine. When off, only the strongest effect plays.
controls.rumble.crashed: Continue rumble effects while the rider is crashed.
controls.rumble.effect_profile: Use shared settings (Global) or separate settings per bike.
controls.rumble.bumps: Vibration from suspension travel over bumps. Min/Max set the suspension velocity range in m/s.
controls.rumble.slide: Vibration when the bike slides sideways. Min/Max set the slide angle range in degrees.
controls.rumble.spin: Vibration from rear wheel spin. Min/Max set the wheel slip ratio range.
controls.rumble.lockup: Vibration when brakes lock up. Min/Max set the wheel slip ratio range.
controls.rumble.wheelie: Vibration during wheelies. Min/Max set the pitch angle range in degrees.
controls.rumble.steer: Vibration from steering forces. Min/Max set the steering torque range in Newton-meters.
controls.rumble.rpm: Vibration synchronized with engine RPM. Min/Max set the RPM range.
controls.rumble.surface: Vibration from rough terrain. Min/Max set the vehicle speed range when off-track.
controls.widgets.lap: Shows current lap number and total laps in the session.
controls.widgets.position: Shows your current race position (P1, P2, etc.).
controls.widgets.time: Shows elapsed session time or time remaining.
controls.widgets.speed: Shows current ground speed in mph or km/h.
controls.widgets.gear: Shows current gear with shift indicator that turns red at shift point.
controls.widgets.speedo: Analog speedometer gauge showing current speed, with odometer and trip meter.
controls.widgets.bars: Vertical bars showing throttle, brake, clutch, RPM, suspension, and fuel levels.
controls.widgets.fuel: Shows remaining fuel level and estimated laps.
controls.widgets.gamepad: Visual representation of controller button inputs.
controls.widgets.clock: Shows current local time. Supports 12h/24h format and optional UTC display.
controls.widgets.lean: Shows rider lean angle in degrees with arc gauge.
controls.widgets.pointer: Mouse pointer for interacting with HUD elements.
controls.widgets.tyre_temp: Shows front and rear tyre temperatures.
controls.hotkeys.map: Toggle the track map HUD on/off.
controls.hotkeys.lap_log: Toggle the lap log HUD on/off.
controls.hotkeys.ideal_lap: Toggle the ideal lap HUD on/off.
controls.hotkeys.input: Toggle the input display HUD on/off.
controls.hotkeys.gap_bar: Toggle the gap bar HUD on/off.
controls.hotkeys.lap_consistency: Toggle the lap consistency HUD on/off.
controls.stats.visibility_mode: When to show. Always displays on track, On Finish appears after crossing the finish line.
controls.stats.show_lap: Show last completed lap column with per-lap stats.
controls.stats.show_session: Show current session column with accumulated session stats.
controls.stats.show_alltime: Show all-time column with lifetime stats for this track and bike.
controls.fmx.chain_rows: Number of tricks shown in the stack. Off hides the stack, 1 shows active trick only, 2+ shows history.
controls.fmx.row_trick_stats: Show duration, distance, and peak rotation below the active trick name.
controls.fmx.row_combo_arc: Show combo arc with chain multiplier and score breakdown.
controls.fmx.row_arcs: Show pitch, yaw, and roll rotation arcs with start and peak markers.
controls.fmx.debug_logging: Log trick detection state to the plugin log file at 10fps (developer mode only).
controls.fmx.row_debug_values: Show raw rotation values for pitch, yaw, and roll (developer mode only).
controls.notices.wrong_way: Show warning when riding in the wrong direction.
controls.notices.blue_flag: Show notice when a faster rider is approaching to pass.
controls.notices.overtime: Show notice when the session timer expires in a time+laps race and extra laps begin.
controls.notices.last_lap: Show notice when starting the final lap of a race.
controls.notices.finished: Show finishing position when crossing the line (e.g. FINISHED 1ST). Updates if penalties change it.
controls.notices.alltime_pb: Show notice when setting an all-time personal best lap.
controls.notices.fastest_lap: Show notice when setting the fastest lap in an online race.
controls.notices.session_pb: Show notice when setting a session personal best lap.
controls.notices.hazard_stationary: Show warning when a stationary rider is on the track ahead.
controls.notices.hazard_wrong_way: Show warning when a rider going the wrong way is on the track ahead.
controls.notices.default_setup: Show warning when entering the track with the default bike setup.
controls.notices.duration: How long timed notices stay on screen. Wrong way, blue flag, and hazard notices last as long as active.
controls.event_log.icons: Show small icons next to each event indicating the event type.
controls.event_log.display_mode: Off hides the log. On always shows it. Auto-hide shows it briefly when new events arrive.
controls.event_log.duration: How long the log stays visible after the last event in auto-hide mode.
controls.event_log.order: Oldest shows events chronologically top to bottom. Newest puts latest events at the top.
controls.event_log.max_events: Maximum number of event rows to display. The log scrolls when this limit is reached.
controls.event_log.timestamp: Session shows the session timer value. Clock shows your local time.
controls.event_log.session: Log session lifecycle: started (with format), pre-start, ended, cancelled, complete.
controls.event_log.fastest_lap: Log when a rider sets the overall fastest lap of the session.
controls.event_log.penalties: Log when a rider receives a penalty, or when a penalty is cleared or changed.
controls.event_log.rider_out: Log when a rider retires, is disqualified, or does not start.
controls.event_log.overtime: Log when a timed race enters overtime, or when a non-race session timer expires.
controls.event_log.final_lap: Log when a rider starts their final lap.
controls.event_log.finished: Log when a rider crosses the finish line with their finishing position.
controls.event_log.pit: Log when a rider enters or exits the pits. Can be frequent in practice sessions.
controls.hotkeys.event_log: Toggle the event log HUD on/off.
